---
title: "Start At"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
  typst:
    output-file: "example-start-at-typst.pdf"
filters:
  - ../_extensions/footnote-styles/footnote-styles.lua
extensions:
  footnote-styles:
    style: "roman-lower"
    separator: "."
    start-at: 4
---

The first footnote here begins at iv, as if this document is continuing from a piece that had three earlier footnotes.[^1] Here is the next.[^2] And a third.[^3]

A fourth footnote here.[^4] And a fifth.[^5]

[^1]: First footnote—marker is iv.
[^2]: Second footnote—marker is v.
[^3]: Third footnote—marker is vi.
[^4]: Fourth footnote—marker is vii.
[^5]: Fifth footnote—marker is viii.
